Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Created: {d[\\"name\\"]} - Score: {d[\\"totalScore\\"]} - Tier: {d[\\"priorityTier\\"]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Dashboard: {d[\\"total\\"]} journalists, tiers={d[\\"tiers\\"]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  - {j[\\"name\\"]} \({j[\\"totalScore\\"]}pts, Tier {j[\\"priorityTier\\"]}\)'\) for j in d]")
